subject: Snover — round teal-white creature with a cone-shaped snowy top, standing in a snowy mountain setting beside a tree stump
description: A small round creature with a white cone-shaped head resembling a snow-capped mountain peak stands in a snowy landscape. Its body is teal-green and white, with stubby arms extended outward. A weathered tree stump sits nearby, and the background shows a soft snow-covered mountain terrain under an overcast pale sky. The mood is quiet and wintry. The palette is dominated by whites, pale blues, and teal-greens.
foreground: round teal-white creature beside a tree stump in snow
background: snowy mountain landscape under pale sky
emotion: placid, calm presence in a cold environment
